data.description:
Goal:
Add first-class optional scope metadata to the Knots domain model so a knot can carry scope volume, scope reliability, quorum confidence/spread, and rubric result references without using notes or tags.

Verification:
1. Run `cargo test` from ~/knots and confirm the test suite passes.
2. Run `kno -C ~/knots fsck` and confirm the store validates.

Constraints:
Keep these as optional nullable fields for backward compatibility. Do not repurpose any existing estimate/minutes field for scope volume.
